title: Current Location Button
excerpt: Hi, I would like to know if it is possible to add in location a button with current location instead of typing in manually the adresse. Thank You

posts.author: surcaltrans (Selmar Corrado)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I would like to know if it is possible to add in location a button with current location instead of typing in manually the adresse. Thank You

posts.author: alitco18881888 (alitco1888)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, capturing current location + Typing manually. (Both options will add value)
capturing current location = will be beneficial for the person those who are on the site.
Typing Manually field = The person not on site
so, both options will be beneficial.

posts.author: peterkahan (peterkahan)
posts.cookedHtml: This is very true for my location and coordinates
